tasks.title: Provision v3.6 activation and evidence environments
tasks.description: Provision the external runner, package, authentication, and JWKS environments required to turn the completed v3.6 repository implementation into same-revision fixed-runner and immutable release evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Ubuntu 22.04 x86_64 fixed runner is online with self-hosted/Linux/X64 labels, glibc 2.35, GCC 13, CMake, Ninja, sccache, Docker, Python 3.12, .NET 8, Syft, auditwheel, and GNU binutils.
The runner user can write /opt/boost-gateway/{conan,sccache,tools}; the Conan 2.8.1 Python 3.12 environment and the default v3.6 lockfile graph pass strict offline install.
The v3.5.3 legacy leaderboard binary is installed on the Linux runner and LEGACY_RAFT_BINARY, LEGACY_RAFT_REVISION, and platform SHA-256 are configured.
GitHub DNS plus HTTPS/SSH connectivity is available, and GitHub CLI authentication can push the branch, dispatch workflows, read artifacts, and manage repository Issues without timeout.
A native macOS ARM64 self-hosted runner is registered with Syft and the approved Conan acquisition path.
A runner-reachable HTTPS JWKS endpoint has trusted TLS, two rotatable RSA/RS256 kids, stable issuer/audience, and a controllable outage mode.
release.yml, sdk-distribution.yml, debug-symbols.yml, macos-arm64.yml, and the JWKS rotation drill pass on one exact candidate SHA and their artifact/run identifiers are recorded.

tasks.title: Close Linux ARM64 and macOS ARM64 production evidence
tasks.description: macOS ARM64 build/package/native-R5 exact-SHA evidence closed in run 29898739439 at c5dccea425376816196c6ea07f26e4bb3787b813. Run 29900276243 at d5dfef545b2be09539b8edea2be42ef16cc6723d additionally passed native bounded performance/stability smoke, package, SBOM, and checksum evidence. Remaining priority order is Linux ARM64 runner/cache/R5, full platform-specific baseline/soak/capacity evidence, then release, SDK, symbols, published-asset verification, and readiness without reusing linux-x64 conclusions.
acceptance_criteria: Linux ARM64 runner is online and its GCC 13 Release Conan namespace passes --no-remote --build=never for the ARM64 lockfile.
The linux/arm64 Compose image set passes offline R5 preflight and gateway recovery on the Linux ARM64 runner.
Platform-specific soak, capacity, and performance baselines pass for Linux ARM64 and macOS ARM64 on one frozen candidate SHA.
Release, debug-symbol, SDK distribution, published-asset verification, and readiness workflows emit and verify separate linux-arm64 and macos-arm64 artifacts.

tasks.title: Review and integrate Linux runner changes
tasks.description: After the Linux runner changes are committed and pushed, fetch the exact remote branch or commit, review and integrate it locally, validate the combined platform evidence implementation, and use the resulting facts to reprioritize the remaining production-platform work.
acceptance_criteria: The Linux runner branch name and exact commit SHA are recorded before integration starts.

The remote changes are fetched without overwriting unrelated local work and are reviewed for runner labels, persistent Conan cache identity, Linux architecture handling, Docker image platform, R5 evidence, workflow security, and documentation consistency.
Merge or rebase conflicts are resolved without weakening linux-x64, linux-arm64, or macos-arm64 platform boundaries.
Relevant Python tests, Conan governance, workflow catalog, fixed-runner plan, Docker R5 policy checks, and any runner-specific validation introduced by the change all pass on the integrated revision.
TODO-0002 and the project priority plan are updated from the integrated runner evidence, with completed items checked only when supported by exact-SHA artifacts.

tasks.title: Execute parallel Linux and macOS production evidence tracks
tasks.description: Run Linux and macOS evidence work in parallel from the same repository branch, then freeze one candidate SHA and refresh final artifacts without substituting evidence across linux-x64, linux-arm64, and macos-arm64. The shared pre-freeze capability revision is d5dfef545b2be09539b8edea2be42ef16cc6723d: macOS run 29900276243 passed strict-offline build, CTest, native R5, bounded performance/stability smoke, package, SBOM, and checksum; native JWKS workflow wiring is ready but requires default-branch registration before dispatch. Linux x64/ARM64 evidence, macOS full baseline, dSYM, osx-arm64 SDK, release assets, and final same-SHA refresh remain open.
acceptance_criteria: The integration branch is synchronized on both runner hosts and the pre-freeze revision used for capability runs is recorded.
Linux x64 prepares and runs strict-offline JWKS, release, SDK distribution, debug-symbol, R0, and R5/R6 evidence as soon as each workflow is available on the default branch.
A native Linux ARM64 runner completes identity, GCC 13 Conan Release/Debug/gRPC cache admission, linux/arm64 image preflight, and native R5 recovery evidence.
macOS ARM64 completes native JWKS workflow wiring, platform-specific stability/performance baselines, dSYM/debug-symbol packaging, osx-arm64 SDK consumers, and release-asset verification.
After repository changes stop, one candidate SHA is frozen and every claimed platform refreshes its required summaries and immutable assets on that exact SHA.
Production readiness rejects cross-platform or cross-SHA evidence and records remaining unsupported platform capabilities explicitly.
